sourceRefs: DRAFT — C1 theme unit. Covers the implicit-meaning toolkit (ironie, antiphrase, litote, allusion, sous-entendu; the name-then-translate exam move) and the social-ladder lexicon (ascension sociale, gravir les échelons, condition ouvrière, lutte sociale, travail au noir). Reading: an antiphrastic 'virtues of laziness' column with a 1936 congés-payés allusion. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'Socialement vôtre' (décoder les allusions et les implicites; 'Des vertus de la paresse'; 'Trader, un métier d'avenir ?'; Journal de Simone Weil). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
